nasb.text: So Abimelech and all the people who were with him arose by night and lay in wait against Shechem in four companies.

esv.text: So Abimelech and all the men who were with him rose up by night and set an ambush against Shechem in four companies.

cnv.text: 於是亞比米勒和與他在一起的人，都在夜間起來，分作四隊，埋伏著等候示劍人。

ccb.text: 于是，亚比米勒带领军队夜间出发，兵分四路埋伏在示剑城外。
